collections.name: clients
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_clients_document_number` ON `clients` (document_number) WHERE document_number IS NOT NULL AND document_number != ''

collections.name: plants
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_plants_document_number` ON `plants` (document_number) WHERE document_number IS NOT NULL AND document_number != ''

collections.name: password_management_logs
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_password_logs_created ON password_management_logs (created DESC)

collections.name: audit_logs
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_audit_logs_created ON audit_logs (created DESC)

collections.name: permission_groups
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_pgroups_name ON permission_groups (name)

collections.name: user_permissions
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_uperm_user ON user_permissions (userId)

collections.name: chain_of_custody
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_custody_created ON chain_of_custody (created DESC)

collections.name: security_alerts
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_sec_alerts_created ON security_alerts (created DESC)
